name: Pre-Engineered Building Manufacturer
description:
SAMAN is a pre-engineered building manufacturer that fabricates every structure in-house — the primary portal frames, secondary members, and roof and wall cladding are cut, welded, and finished at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida, then shipped to your site. We are the maker, not a trading desk that buys structures in and re-labels them. The configured building on this page is a 60×26×19 ft unit on a mild steel frame with a PUF sandwich-panel envelope, priced at Rs 19,65,000 inclusive of taxes. When you shortlist manufacturers, you are really checking one thing — who actually builds the structure you take delivery of, and whether they can prove it at the scale your project needs.

Who is a genuine pre-engineered building manufacturer?

A pre-engineered building manufacturer is the company that physically makes your steel framing — primary and secondary members cut and welded on its own line, with the steel traceable to a mill certificate by heat number. A trader does none of that; it re-labels components bought from other fabricators and assembled by someone else.

The difference shows up in one place a buyer can actually inspect: the factory. A maker can point to the plant, the lines the steel runs through, and the inspection record behind a specific order — and that is what the rest of this page sets out, rather than asking you to take a claim on trust.

Inside SAMAN's two manufacturing plants — Bangalore and Greater Noida

Inside a SAMAN fabrication plant — primary PEB portal frames on jigs beside the CNC beam-drilling line.

Both plants run the same in-house fabrication sequence: CNC beam drilling and cutting to the structural programme, automated welding at load-bearing joints, and shot-blasting to Sa 2.5 cleanliness before primer is applied. Nothing in your order is fabricated by an outside workshop. Operating as a pre-engineered structure manufacturer with two facilities does two things for you: the plant nearer your site handles dispatch, so freight is shorter, and production is never bottlenecked at a single location. Because the frame, panels, and fasteners are all cut and matched under one roof, they are specified to work together before anything is loaded — the join a trader sourcing parts from different fabricators cannot guarantee.

Production capacity — from a 500 sq ft block to 1,00,000 sq ft and multi-site orders

A multi-building order at an industrial zone — identical navy and green pre-engineered buildings dispatched together.

SAMAN fabricates pre-engineered building structures from 500 sq ft up to 1,00,000 sq ft, with more than 500 projects delivered across India. For a single building, that range means we are not forcing your requirement into a fixed product. For large, repeat, or multi-site buyers, it means something more specific: every structural member for a multi-bay or multi-building order is cut from the same CNC programme in the same steel grade, so building one and building twelve are dimensionally identical. Phased orders for an industrial park or campus are dispatched in coordinated batches, and we retain the drawings and steel specification so a Phase 2 supplied months later matches Phase 1 by section and heat-traceable grade. As pre-engineered building manufacturers in India working with EPC and industrial procurement teams, this consistency at scale is what the credential question is really about. The complete supply offering across every scale sits within the full pre-engineered building range.

The quality process behind every SAMAN-manufactured building

A completed SAMAN pre-engineered warehouse in use at an industrial site, with roller-shutter loading bays.

Quality on a fabricated steel structure is a process, not a single certificate. Every SAMAN order moves through five controlled stages: incoming steel checked against its mill certificate by heat number, CNC cutting to programme dimensions, welding to a qualified weld procedure, shot-blasting and priming under cover, and a pre-dispatch dimensional and surface inspection before loading. That sequence — applied identically to every unit — is what keeps the first and the fiftieth structure in an order the same. Heat-number traceability and the inspection record are the proof a procurement team can verify. If your project is government-tendered or sits on an SEZ or industrial-zone plot and your submission needs the full IS 800/875/1893 document set assembled, our steel-specification and IS-documentation page covers exactly which documents you receive and what each one clears.

What a manufacturer-direct order includes — and who erects it

A complete pre-engineered building kit loaded for dispatch — supplied for the buyer's own erection team.

Buying direct from the manufacturer means the figure you see is the maker's price, with no reseller margin on top. The configured 60×26×19 ft Steel-and-PUF building on this page is Rs 19,65,000 inclusive of taxes — a reference, not a flat rate; what mainly moves it is the steel tonnage your span and height call for and whether you choose an insulated PUF envelope. What you receive is the complete bolt-together kit: primary and secondary framing, roofing and cladding, fasteners, structural drawings, and an erection sequence for assembly by your own team. We issue the foundation requirement with the drawings so your civil contractor pours in parallel rather than after delivery. If you would rather the structure were designed, supplied, and erected for you under one contract, that managed service is handled separately by our PEB-construction team — a different scope from the manufacturer-supply order this page covers.

Which SAMAN pre-engineered building page fits your project?

Several SAMAN pages carry the word "manufacturer," and they are not interchangeable — each answers a different procurement starting point. This is the general manufacturer page, for buyers vetting our credentials and sourcing at scale. If your tender or SEZ file is written in structural-steel language and leads on IS documentation, the steel-specification page above is the closer fit. If your specification uses metal-building language — sheds, hangars, lighter sheet-clad envelopes — our metal-building manufacturer page is the match. And if you already know the configuration you want and would rather order a configured building at a set price than vet a maker, the configured product lists sizes, spans, and cost. Every one of these is fabricated on the same two lines to the same IS 2062 standard — what changes is the question your project is built around, not the steel behind it.

Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the manufacturer of a pre-engineered building like the one on this page?

SAMAN. The steel frame, secondary members, and cladding are fabricated at our own plants in Bangalore and Greater Noida — not bought from a third-party fabricator and re-labelled. You deal directly with the team that cuts, welds, and finishes the structure you take delivery of, and the mill certificates trace to the steel in your specific order.

What does a pre-engineered building cost when bought direct from the manufacturer?

The configured 60×26×19 ft steel-and-PUF building on this page is Rs 19,65,000 inclusive of taxes — a reference, not a flat rate. Your figure is driven mainly by the steel tonnage your span and height require and the cladding you choose, quoted direct with no reseller margin on top.

Can SAMAN handle a large-scale or multi-site order?

Yes. We fabricate from 500 sq ft to 1,00,000 sq ft and have delivered 500+ projects. Multi-building and multi-site orders are cut from the same CNC programme and steel grade for dimensional consistency, dispatched in coordinated batches, with drawings retained so a later phase matches the first by section and heat-traceable grade.

Is erection included, or is this a supply-only order?

Supply-only. You receive the complete fabricated kit with structural drawings and an erection sequence, and your own team assembles it on a foundation poured to our layout — the standard arrangement when you source from a manufacturer. Erection by us is a different product: design, supply, and erection under a single contract is run by our PEB-construction team, not this manufacturer-supply page.

Get a Manufacturer-Direct Quote

Send your span, eave height, floor area, and site location for a manufacturer-direct quote — we confirm steel tonnage, an itemised price, and lead time within 24 hours.

Bangalore: Call +91 80886 85440 | WhatsApp +91 88616 22859
Delhi NCR: Call +91 87960 39938 | WhatsApp +91 97089 89937

Pre-Engineered Building — 60×26×19 ft
Fabricated In-House at Two Plants
Steel PEB structures made in-house in Bangalore & Greater Noida — mill-traceable steel, 500+ projects, supplied for your own erection team.
Size Range
500–1,00,000 sq ft
Frame / Panel
IS 2062 MS / PUF
Price / Delivery
₹19,65,000 / 21–35 d

9–50 m / 500+ projects
In-house at 2 plants
